The organization shall establish AI objectives at relevant functions and levels. The AI objectives shall: a) be consistent with the AI policy (see 5.2); b) be measurable (if practicable); c) take into account applicable requirements; d) be monitored; e) be communicated; f) be updated as appropriate; g) be available as documented information. When planning how to achieve its AI objectives, the organization shall determine: — what will be done; — what resources will be required; — who will be responsible; — when it will be completed; — how the results will be evaluated.
